positive: Minimalist abstract celestial map showing stylized constellations and nebulas, rendered in clean linework and deep indigo blues against a muted cream background. Focus on interconnected, glowing geometric patterns forming recognizable animal and mythological shapes (e.g., a stylized wolf, a crescent moon, a nebula flower). The composition must be highly balanced and centrally focused, suitable for repeat or large apparel prints. Use fine etched lines, subtle glowing gradient accents, and a graphic, art-deco celestial style. High contrast, clean silhouette edges, vector art aesthetic.
negative: blur, watermark, text, logo, signature, dirty, noisy, low detail, artifact, extra limbs, bad anatomy, cropped, grain, gradient fade
